_comment: Pick ONE transport (smtp or webhook). Leave the other empty. Digest runs once daily by default.

webhook._comment_url: POSTs JSON body: {client_id, month, metric, value, threshold_pct, detail}. Use Slack incoming webhook, Zapier catch hook, or your own endpoint.

_comment_mode: digest = one daily summary email, event = one notification per threshold crossing
_comment_digest_hour: Hour of day (UTC) when digest fires. 14 UTC = 9 AM EST / 6 AM PST.
